subcodes.first_line: O delicate branch of the Tree of Sinai! Blessed art thou, who hast sprung from this sacred Tree and this blessed Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع لطیف شجره سیناء خوشا که از این دوحه مقدسه روایدی و از این سدره مبارکه
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @firmness in the Covenant, @call to action, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
